title: sida corrugata var. filiformis
intro: Sida corrugata var. filiformis, also known as the rough-seed sida, is a plant species in the Malvaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sida corrugata var. filiformis include treating fever, diarrhea, and wounds, as well as providing relief from inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of Sida corrugata var. filiformis can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
